docs.title: skill_pool — home
docs.body: Self-hosted Claude Code skill registry for teams. Compose AI agents from skills. Publish, install, browse, and govern SKILL.md, subagents, slash commands, and plugins under tenant-scoped SSO with a full audit trail. Rust Axum SvelteKit Postgres pgvector MIT.

docs.title: Auto-bootstrap with direnv
docs.body: direnv allow detects your stack — Cargo.toml flake.nix package.json pyproject.toml go.mod — and prompts to install matching skills with one keystroke.

docs.title: Projects — per-repo curated bundles
docs.body: Curators pin acme-billing → code-reviewer sqlx-migrations cs-backend-engineer. Developers clone the repo and get exactly that bundle. Auto-discovers via git remote URL.

docs.title: Retrospective capture
docs.body: Stop-hook scorer plus async Haiku to Sonnet drafter. Solved problems become draft skills that a reviewer publishes from the web inbox. The catalog grows from work that already happened.

docs.title: Multi-tenant + SSO
docs.body: Per-tenant OIDC SAML SCIM. Scoped API tokens. Audit log with SIEM-friendly export. Shared mode for most. Dedicated mode for regulated tenants.

docs.title: Semantic search
docs.body: bge-small embeddings computed on publish. GET /v1/skills?semantic=axum middleware ranks by meaning not substring.

docs.title: MCP transport
docs.body: Claude can call search_skills and install_skill inline via the registry's MCP JSON-RPC endpoint. No CLI shell-out.

docs.title: Components — server, web, CLI, capture
docs.body: Stateless Rust Axum server. Three served surfaces on one router: REST /v1/* tenant-scoped Bearer; /.claude-plugin/marketplace.json public read; /git/plugins/<slug>.git smart HTTP public read. Postgres 17 pgvector. opendal storage S3 fs MinIO. Optional Redis cache and queue.

docs.title: Tenancy — shared and dedicated modes
docs.body: Shared mode: one server DB bucket. Every row carries tenant_id. Subdomain routing. Dedicated mode: one server DB bucket per tenant. Same image different DSN. Trade efficiency for isolation.

docs.title: Data flow — publish a skill
docs.body: CLI tars and gzips directory. POST /v1/skills multipart. Server lints, secret-scans, sha256, uploads to opendal, inserts skills row, inserts audit_events row. Returns 201 with canonical metadata.

docs.title: Data flow — install a skill
docs.body: CLI loads .skill-pool/manifest.toml. For each skill not in library, GET /v1/skills/{slug}/bundle.tar.gz, extract to library, symlink into .claude/skills/.

docs.title: Data flow — plugin install in Claude Code
docs.body: User runs /plugin marketplace add https://acme.skills.example. Claude GETs marketplace.json. User runs /plugin install acme-toolkit. Claude git clones /git/plugins/<slug>.git. Bundle cached at ~/.claude/plugins/cache/.

docs.title: Data flow — retrospective capture pipeline
docs.body: Stop-hook scorer rates session deterministically: token count, time on task, edit density, test run ratio. SessionEnd hook queues transcript. Capturer daemon claims oldest, Haiku extracts topic and tags, Sonnet drafts SKILL.md. Curator approves from drafts inbox.

docs.title: Key invariants — tenant_id, audit log, stateless
docs.body: Every business query filters by tenant_id, enforced by static extractor on every sqlx::query!. Object storage keys tenant-prefixed. Audit log writes mandatory. App stateless, safe to replicate horizontally.

docs.title: Tech stack
docs.body: Rust Axum sqlx tokio opendal redis-rs. Postgres 17 pgvector 0.7. SvelteKit 2 Svelte 5 runes Tailwind v4. clap reqwest. openidconnect samael SCIM v2. tracing-subscriber Prometheus OTLP. Nix flake Helm chart Terraform AWS Caddy ACME.

docs.title: 15-engineer startup outgrowing dotfiles
docs.body: Series A SaaS three product squads. Every .claude folder different. Brilliant skills trapped on one laptop. Onboarding starts from zero. Curate per-repo bundles. direnv installs them on clone. Auto-bootstrap projects semantic search.

docs.title: Multi-tenant SaaS platform
docs.body: One server multiple customer tenants. Shared mode cost efficient. Dedicated mode escape hatch for regulated tenants. Per-tenant theme: logo palette font favicon custom domain Caddy ACME. SSO OIDC SAML SCIM. Audit log.

docs.title: Regulated enterprise SOC 2 FedRAMP GxP
docs.body: Internal platform team. AI tooling needs security review. Secret scan on publish. RBAC audit log SIEM export. Dedicated isolation per regulated tenant: separate DB bucket domain. Same image three deployments isolated blast radius.

docs.title: Consultancy or agency rotating consultants
docs.body: 40-person dev agency 12 client engagements different tech stacks. Consultants rotate. Wikis stale. One server one tenant per client. Projects per repo. Retrospective capture turns sessions into draft skills. Replacement gets the skills automatically.

docs.title: OSS maintainer publishing a plugin
docs.body: Maintainer publishes plugin. skill-pool publish --kind plugin. marketplace.json generated server-side. /plugin install clones from smart HTTP git endpoint. Bundles skills agents commands hooks MCP servers.

docs.title: Capturing tribal knowledge automatically
docs.body: Stop-hook scorer flags valuable sessions. Capturer daemon: Haiku extracts intent, Sonnet drafts SKILL.md. Curator reviews in drafts inbox. Diff against existing skills. Approve. Catalog grows from work that already happened.

docs.title: When NOT to use skill_pool
docs.body: Solo developer commit dotfiles instead. Two person team share editor instead. Have not adopted Claude Code yet start there first. No platform team and don't want one self-hosting has a floor of operational complexity.

docs.title: Quickstart — Nix flake
docs.body: git clone repo. nix develop drops you in dev shell. docker compose -f server/compose.yaml up -d brings Postgres MinIO Caddy. cargo run skill-pool-server on :8080. cd web && npm install && npm run dev portal on :3000.

docs.title: Quickstart — Docker Compose
docs.body: docker compose -f server/compose.yaml up -d. API 8080. Portal 3000. Caddy 8081 subdomain routed tenants. MinIO console 9001.

docs.title: Quickstart — NixOS module
docs.body: services.skill-pool.enable=true. Tenants list. STORAGE_URL DATABASE_URL_FILE for agenix or sops-nix. Composes systemd hardening: NoNewPrivileges ProtectSystem DynamicUser.

docs.title: Quickstart — Helm chart Kubernetes
docs.body: helm install skills skill-pool/skill-pool. Postgres DSN storage URL ingress hosts. Migration job runner HPA PodDisruptionBudget NetworkPolicy optional Redis subchart.

docs.title: Quickstart — Terraform AWS
docs.body: Provisions EKS RDS Postgres ElastiCache Redis S3 ACM cert IRSA role GitHub OIDC trust. No long-lived AWS keys in CI.

docs.title: Per-repo projects with .skill-pool manifest
docs.body: skill-pool project init writes .skill-pool/manifest.toml. project pin code-reviewer sqlx-migrations cs-backend-engineer. Commit to repo. Anyone cloning runs skill-pool ensure to install the same bundle.

docs.title: Auto-bootstrap with direnv use skill-pool
docs.body: Put use skill-pool in .envrc. direnv allow on first cd detects rust axum postgres nixos and prompts to install matching skills.

docs.title: Seed demo with 120+ skills
docs.body: ./scripts/seed-demo.sh populates 76 skills 43 agents 1 command tenant theme members drafts SSO config usage events. Content from borghei/Claude-Skills MIT + Commons Clause.

docs.title: What is a Claude Code plugin
docs.body: Plugin is Claude Code's packaging primitive bundling skills agents commands hooks MCP servers LSP servers monitors. Marketplace is the catalog Claude consumes via /plugin marketplace add.

docs.title: Plugin sourcing modes — internal external mirror
docs.body: Internal: authored in skill-pool, hosted from /git/plugins/<slug>.git. External: lives in third-party git repo, marketplace just lists it. Mirror: cloned locally on schedule, served from skill-pool. Air-gapped tenants use mirror.

docs.title: Author your first plugin
docs.body: mkdir .claude-plugin. Write plugin.json with name version skills agents commands hooks. skill-pool publish --kind plugin. Validates manifest, resolves entries, secret scans, packs, publishes to marketplace.

docs.title: Plugin manifest schema
docs.body: Fields: name (slug unique per tenant), version (semver immutable), skills[] agents[] commands[] arrays of {slug,version}, hooks SessionStart Stop SessionEnd, mcp_servers, monitors, themes, settings.

docs.title: Mirror refresh worker
docs.body: pull_interval_secs default 24h. Worker wakes every 60s, pulls candidates in parallel. Last-good copy serves on failure. With Redis: durable queue + DLQ. Without: in-process tokio task.

docs.title: API common — auth, tenant resolution, errors
docs.body: Authorization Bearer token. Tenant by subdomain or X-Skill-Pool-Tenant header. Error codes: not_found unauthorized forbidden bad_request tenant_resolution_failed not_implemented internal_error.

docs.title: GET /v1/healthz
docs.body: No auth. Returns deps.db deps.storage deps.embedder up down off latency_ms. Always 200 to avoid LB flap. Page on deps.db.status down.

docs.title: Skills Agents Commands endpoints
docs.body: GET /v1/skills list. POST publish multipart secret scan. GET {slug} metadata. GET {slug}/bundle.tar.gz 302 signed URL. GET {slug}/skill-md raw text. DELETE {slug}/versions/{version} archive. Kind discriminator skill agent command.

docs.title: Semantic search /v1/skills?semantic=
docs.body: Cosine similarity of description_embedding. min_similarity filter. Returns 400 if no embedder configured. Build with --features fastembed to enable.

docs.title: Plugins API Layer 3
docs.body: GET /v1/plugins list. POST publish, resolves nested {slug,version}, 409 on duplicate version. GET {slug} detail sourcing mode refresh state. POST {slug}/refresh mirror only. DELETE {slug}/versions/{version} archive.

docs.title: Projects and Plans Layer 2
docs.body: Project binds repo git remote URL to curated skills. Plan is curator-authored versioned bundle. GET /v1/projects auto-discover. GET /v1/projects/{slug}/plan resolved. POST /v1/plans publish. GET /v1/plans/{slug}/history immutable version log.

docs.title: Drafts inbox capture pipeline
docs.body: POST /v1/drafts capturer daemon posts Sonnet draft SKILL.md and frontmatter. GET /v1/drafts curator inbox paginated. POST approve promote to skill version. POST reject discard with reason.

docs.title: Decay candidates GET /v1/tenant/skills/decay
docs.body: Admin only. last_used > 6 months AND uses < 3. Portal graveyard view uses this.

docs.title: Tenants and tokens admin endpoints
docs.body: POST /v1/tenant/tokens mint scoped: read publish admin. GET /v1/tenant/members. POST /v1/tenant/sso configure OIDC SAML 2.0. GET /v1/tenant/theme logo palette font favicon custom domain. SCIM v2 /scim/v2/Users Groups.

docs.title: Audit log endpoints
docs.body: GET /v1/tenant/audit paginated filterable by actor action resource time range. GET /v1/tenant/audit/export.jsonl signed JSONL for SIEM ingestion. Every mutation in the system.

docs.title: Public read surfaces marketplace.json git plugins
docs.body: GET /.claude-plugin/marketplace.json no auth Claude Code installer consumes. GET /git/plugins/<slug>.git/* smart HTTP no auth. Tenant routing by Host subdomain custom domain.

docs.title: MCP transport JSON-RPC
docs.body: /mcp endpoint. search_skills install_skill. Bearer auth. Claude manages its own toolbox without shelling out to CLI.

docs.title: Demo — CLI and portal walkthrough
docs.body: Two halves recorded by one script: CLI a developer runs locally and portal view a curator sees in parallel. init --project login bootstrap project list plan show plan import plan history doctor.

docs.title: 90-second three-act walkthrough
docs.body: Three acts: init login bootstrap project-aware install. project list show plan show browse curated bundle. plan import history doctor import updated plan verify state.
